docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GODDARD, GERTRUDE AS TO DEFENDANT FARRELL, JANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (20 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GODDARD, GERTRUDE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 SERVED FEB-08-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FARRELL, JANA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-21-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF GERTRUDE GODDARD IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED TAGALOG COURT INTERPRETER CAROLINE CARERRA #301298. DEFENDANT JANA FARRELL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE IS DISMISSED FOR FAILURE TO BRING THE CASE WITHIN THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS.
